description:
You are a systems administrator at a university facilities management department. As part of an IT security audit, document the technical specifications from the Emoncms Admin panel. Create a report file at /home/ga/system_audit_report.txt containing the following fields, each on its own line in 'key: value' format:

- emoncms_version: The Emoncms version
- mysql_version: The MySQL/MariaDB server version
- php_version: The PHP version
- redis_status: The Redis connection status
- server_os: The server operating system string
- feed_count: The total number of feeds
- input_count: The total number of inputs
- mqtt_status: The MQTT server connection status
